target.title: feat(gateway): add LLM request context headers for AI gateway integra…
target.body:
…tion

Propagate session, attempt, and turn-level context via HTTP headers to enable AI gateways to extract tracing/billing information without JWT parsing.

Headers injected:
- X-OpenClaw-Session-Id: session identifier
- X-OpenClaw-Attempt-Id: attempt (run) identifier
- X-OpenClaw-Fallback: "true" when using fallback model after primary failure
- X-OpenClaw-Turn-Index: monotonically increasing turn index per LLM call
- X-OpenClaw-Turn-Id: unique turn identifier ({attemptId}-turn-{index})

The turn-level headers are injected via streamFn wrapper to ensure each HTTP request gets a unique index, since one prompt() call may trigger multiple LLM HTTP requests (one per tool-result round).

Also adds `isFallback` field to PluginHookLlmOutputEvent for plugin visibility into fallback model usage.
